gene approved anti-neoplastic approved (other) ChEBI
Drug-target genes (corpus chemicals): deeper colour = more chemicals. Green = DGIdb approved anti-neoplastic, amber = DGIdb approved (non-anti-neoplastic), pink = ChEBI, absent in DGIdb.
